title: deepening-opportunity audit of a codebase
invocation_hint: Invoke SKI-PRO-1003 (deepening-opportunity) and produce a deepening audit of the codebase pattern below.
task_description: A Rust project has 12 modules under src/services/ each implementing a different external API integration (Stripe, Sendgrid, Twilio, GitHub, ...). Each module has its own HTTP client setup, retry logic, and error mapping. Apply deepening-opportunity to identify where to extract shared abstractions.
